arguments.argument: if global.gamePaused=false && gDeltaDoTicks { makeEnemyActive(1) if bActive=true { fallingProgress+=1 if fallingProgress=1 x+=1 else if fallingProgress>=2 and fallingProgress<=30 { if shakeDir=1 x-=2 else x+=2 shakeDir*=-1 } else if fallingProgress=31 x=xstart else if fallingProgress>=32 y+=fallSpeed } if y>room_height+24 instance_destroy() }
